cited_facts.why_it_matters: This fact describes the technical functionality of the MPTokensV2 amendment (extending the DEX to support MPTs) but does not contain any information regarding the default voting stance of the source or stable release.
This fact describes the general process for XRPL amendment voting (requiring supermajority) but does not specify the default vote for this specific amendment.

output_json.decision_summary: The provided packet facts describe the technical scope of the MPTokensV2 amendment and the general voting process. Neither fact contains information about the 'source default vote' or the recommended voting stance for this specific amendment. Therefore, the default vote cannot be inferred as YES or NO.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: This output is a replay classification, not proof of amendment correctness.
